beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The land drops away at the edge. The ocean is a long way down and west. At night the sound of it carries up the cliff face — not waves exactly, more like breathing. Something large and patient.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: Standing at the water's edge, the pull is different than looking at it from above. It is not a desire to drown. It is a desire to go somewhere that the plateau cannot reach — past the horizon, past whatever is managing everything back there.

opening_beats.speaker: 0011_ASSN
opening_beats.text: Kore mentioned you. We keep records of people who do things that Kore notices. You have been doing things Kore notices.

opening_beats.speaker: 0011_ASSN
opening_beats.text: Come to the camp tonight. The western plateau edge. We have food and the view is worth the walk.

beats.speaker: 0011_ASSN
beats.text: Good. After dark. The route is through The Rocks going north at the second split.

beats.speaker: 0011_ASSN
beats.text: The offer does not expire. When you are ready.
